privileged_info_summary: The task operates on a synthetic Nx Witness VMS environment deployed at https://localhost:7001 with admin credentials (admin/Admin1234!) as documented in task.json line 5 and task_utils.sh. The system is initialized with system name 'GymAnythingVMS' (setup_nx_witness.sh line 8) and includes 3-5 synthetic test cameras named 'Parking Lot Camera', 'Entrance Camera', 'Server Room Camera', 'Lobby Camera', and 'Loading Dock Camera' (setup_nx_witness.sh line 199). The task uses REST API endpoints at /rest/v1/servers and /rest/v1/devices (task_utils.sh lines 78-212) with Bearer token authentication. The server being reconfigured is initially reset to name 'GymAnything-Default-NVR' (setup_task.sh line 24) and must be renamed to 'CORP-WH07-NVR01' with location metadata 'Warehouse 07, Dock Level, Server Closet B'. All metadata values are consistently verified across task.json, setup scripts, export scripts, and verifier.py.
